- Envíos gratis en millones de productos desde $16.000 (y primeros compras).
- Cuotas sin interés con Tarjeta de Crédito Mercado Pago en compras ≥ $50.000 (hasta 31/03/2026).
- Revisá la sección "Cupones" en la app (después de loguearte) para códigos personalizados y ofertas del día.
- Mirá promociones en electro, hogar y tech con descuentos extra.

Chequeá en la app (logueado) > sección "Cupones" para los personalizados. 

Ofertas vigentes: 
- Envíos gratis en millones de productos (desde ~$16k en muchos casos). 
- Hasta 60% off en ofertas del día (electro, hogar, moda). 
- Cuotas sin interés con Tarjeta Crédito Mercado Pago en compras ≥ $50.000 (hasta 31/03).

This all sounds great but...
Maybe in the future. But right now, the big free cash flow number looks better than it really is because of how $MELI counts loans. In 2025, they put about $6.7 B into Mercado Pago loans. If you take that out, the real free cash flow was more like $1.5B, or about 5% of sales. It could become a real cash flow machine later, but the numbers today don’t show that yet.

Na Argentina: oficial ~27 milhões ARS (Trekking 1.0), equivalente a ~R$ 100 mil (cotação 1 ARS ≈ R$ 0,0037). Em ofertas/ML, ~R$ 85-95 mil equivalentes.

Preços reais de venda são parecidos ou ligeiramente mais altos na Argentina (depende de promo/financiamento).

$AMZN sees drones becoming a meaningful part of its delivery network.

In a recent podcast clip, Amazon CEO Andy Jassy said the company expects drone deliveries to reach roughly 500 million packages per year by the end of the decade. E-commerce companies like $MELI and retailers like $WMT are also investing heavily in automation and robotics alongside logistics platforms like $SYM.

The push toward drones, robots, and automated fulfillment shows how the next phase of e-commerce will be defined by faster and more autonomous delivery systems.
